Absorption & Permeability.HIA_Hou: Predicted Human Intestinal Absorption (HIA) using the Hou method
Absorption & Permeability.PAMPA_NCATS: Permeability in Parallel Artificial Membrane Permeability Assay (NCATS data)

Metabolism (CYP Enzyme Activity).CYP3A4_Substrate_CarbonMangels: Likelihood of being a substrate of CYP3A4 (CarbonMangels model)
Metabolism (CYP Enzyme Activity).CYP2D6_Substrate_CarbonMangels: Likelihood of being a substrate of CYP2D6 (CarbonMangels model)
Metabolism (CYP Enzyme Activity).CYP2C9_Substrate_CarbonMangels: Likelihood of being a substrate of CYP2C9 (CarbonMangels model)
Metabolism (CYP Enzyme Activity).CYP1A2_Veith: Interaction probability with CYP1A2 enzyme (Veith model)
Metabolism (CYP Enzyme Activity).CYP2C19_Veith: Interaction probability with CYP2C19 enzyme (Veith model)
Metabolism (CYP Enzyme Activity).Clearance_Hepatocyte_AZ: Predicted hepatic clearance in hepatocytes (AstraZeneca model)
Metabolism (CYP Enzyme Activity).Clearance_Microsome_AZ: Predicted metabolic clearance in microsomes (AstraZeneca model)

Distribution (Blood-Brain Barrier & Plas.BBB_Martins: Predicted ability to cross the blood-brain barrier (Martins model)
Distribution (Blood-Brain Barrier & Plas.VDss_Lombardo: Volume of Distribution at steady state (Lombardo model)

Toxicity & Safety.hERG: Predicted risk of hERG channel inhibition (QT prolongation, cardiac toxicity)
Toxicity & Safety.AMES: Predicted probability of being mutagenic (AMES test)
Toxicity & Safety.DILI: Predicted risk of Drug-Induced Liver Injury
Toxicity & Safety.ClinTox: Clinical toxicity prediction from known toxic compounds

Physicochemical Properties.Lipinski: Number of Lipinski's Rule of Five violations
Physicochemical Properties.HydrationFreeEnergy_FreeSolv: Hydration free energy from FreeSolv database

Other Properties.hydrogen_bond_acceptors: Number of hydrogen bond acceptor atoms
Other Properties.hydrogen_bond_donors: Number of hydrogen bond donor atoms
Other Properties.CYP2C9_Veith: Interaction probability with CYP2C9 enzyme (Veith model)
Other Properties.CYP2D6_Veith: Interaction probability with CYP2D6 enzyme (Veith model)
Other Properties.CYP3A4_Veith: Interaction probability with CYP3A4 enzyme (Veith model)
Other Properties.NR-AR-LBD: Interaction with Androgen Receptor Ligand Binding Domain
Other Properties.NR-AhR: Activity on the Aryl Hydrocarbon Receptor
Other Properties.NR-ER-LBD: Interaction with Estrogen Receptor Ligand Binding Domain
Other Properties.NR-PPAR-gamma: Activity on Peroxisome Proliferator-Activated Receptor gamma
Other Properties.Pgp_Broccatelli: Likelihood of being a substrate for P-glycoprotein (Broccatelli model)
Other Properties.SR-ARE: Activation of the Antioxidant Response Element pathway
Other Properties.SR-HSE: Activation of the Heat Shock Element pathway
Other Properties.SR-MMP: Activation of mitochondrial membrane potential pathway
Other Properties.SR-p53: Activation of the p53 tumor suppressor pathway
Other Properties.LD50_Zhu: Median lethal dose (LD50) based on Zhu's model
